libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Create test sources annotated with `@Buildable`/related builder annotations and invoke the system Java compiler so the service-registered `BuildableProcessor` and generated builder sources are exercised. For native execution, set `-Djava.home` from `JAVA_HOME` (or `GRAALVM_HOME`) and `-Djava.class.path` to the test runtime classpath on both the test binary and `nativeTest` runtime args, following the existing `io.sundr` annotation-processor tests.
risks: A test that only reflects on annotation declarations will not exercise the processor or generated builders.
The native test requires a JDK/GraalVM installation with the system Java compiler available.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: This artifact is an annotation-processor library; meaningful coverage requires compiling annotated source and exercising its registered processors in the native test.
